description: Monitor Cloudflare observability logs for the wreck-it worker. When errors or exceptions are detected, assess the root cause and create a fix. Check the worker source code, recent deployments, and related configuration to determine if the error requires a code change, a configuration update, or is transient. If a fix is needed, implement and test it.
precondition_prompt: Check if there are any new error or exception log entries from the Cloudflare worker that have not yet been triaged. Look for tasks with the 'log-source:' label prefix to identify already-imported events. Return true if there are new unhandled errors that need investigation, false if all known errors have been addressed.
